narrative:
Precinct Madison Twp Rock Camp (precinct in Columbiana County) has 675 registered voters, with 55.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.9 percentage points.
